description.text: Tunnel through or climb over the sand mountain. One Base.

ru.original: Tunnel through or climb over the sand mountain. One Base.
ru.translation: Песчаная дюна. Можно воевать как на поверхности, так и в туннелях. Одна база.

es.original: Tunnel through or climb over the sand mountain. One Base.
es.translation:
Cava un túnel o escala la montaña.
Un núcleo.

de.original: Tunnel through or climb over the sand mountain. One Base.
de.translation: Grabt euch hindurch oder klettert über den Sandberg. Eine Basis.

fr.original: Tunnel through or climb over the sand mountain. One Base.
fr.translation: Franchissez cette montagne de sable en creusant des tunnels ou en l'escaladant. Une base.

pt.original: Tunnel through or climb over the sand mountain. One Base.
pt.translation: Cave um túnel ou escale a montanha de areia. Uma Base.
